about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am passionate about cybersecurity and technology, with a strong focus on offensive security and ethical hacking. I am currently finishing a Master's Degree in Cybersecurity and Privacy, where I deepen my knowledge in pentesting, forensics, privacy, and threat detection.
about.p2: I am familiar with security-oriented Linux environments such as Kali Linux and Parrot OS, and I have hands-on experience through realistic scenarios on platforms like Hack The Box. I constantly explore new tools and techniques to sharpen my skills.
about.p3: Committed to continuous learning, my goal is to join a technical team where I can contribute value and continue growing professionally in the field of cybersecurity.

master.title: Master’s Degree in Cybersecurity and Privacy
master.description: Specialized training in pentesting (Nmap, Burp Suite, Metasploit, SQLmap, Hydra, Gobuster, etc.), forensic analysis (Autopsy, Volatility, Wireshark), privacy and network security. Preparing for leading industry certifications.

degree.title: Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Engineering
degree.description: Graduate in Computer Engineering with solid background in programming (Java, C, C++, Python), web development (Angular, HTML, CSS, JavaScript), data analysis (Pentaho, Apache Superset), and database systems (MySQL).

home.subtitle: Computer Engineer & Cybersecurity Specialist
home.description: Welcome to my personal portfolio. Here you can explore my education, experience, technical skills and projects.

card.title: Web Development Internship
card.description: Design and implementation of custom web solutions, including requirements analysis, MySQL database architecture, and frontend development with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

skills.title: Skills
skills.introText: These are some of the technologies I work with in my projects.
